summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dental Implant Detector app. All core features working correctly including Roboflow AI integration, object storage, and MongoDB persistence. Frontend UI follows design guidelines with dark mode styling and proper typography.
passed_tests: Backend API - Upload and detect endpoint (200 OK)
Backend API - Get history endpoint (200 OK)
Backend API - Get prediction by ID endpoint (200 OK)
Backend API - Get image from storage endpoint (200 OK)
Backend API - Invalid file upload error handling (400 Bad Request)
Frontend - Initial page load and navigation
Frontend - File upload with preview functionality
Frontend - Detection result display with confidence
Frontend - History page with table display
Frontend - Upload zone dashed border design
